products.name: High Visibility Drill Safety Vest
products.description: Our Class 2 Hi-Vis Safety Vest combines durability, comfort, and certified visibility. Made from heavy-duty drill fabric, it offers excellent resistance to daily wear while maintaining a professional appearance.
features: ANSI / ISEA 107-20 Class 2 high-visibility compliance.
2-inch reflective tape for enhanced visibility.
Durable drill fabric for long-lasting use.
Front zipper closure for easy on and off.
Multiple pockets for practicality and efficiency.
Available sizes: S – M – L – XL – XXL.

products.name: Long Sleeve Work T-Shirt 100% Cotton
products.description: Designed for demanding work environments, our long sleeve work shirt is made from 100% high-quality cotton, offering the perfect balance between durability, comfort, and breathability.
features: Made from 100% cotton for natural comfort and breathability.
Highly durable and comfortable fabric.
Ribbed cuffs for better fit and practicality.
Long sleeve design for added protection.
Comfortable fit for extended wear.
Available sizes: S – M – L – XL – XXL.

products.name: High Visibility Coverall
products.description: Designed for heavy-duty work environments, this high visibility coverall is manufactured using durable drill fabric, providing excellent resistance to abrasion and daily wear while ensuring longlasting performance.
features: Meets ANSI/ISEA 107 - 20 Class 1.
2-inch reflective tape for enhanced visibility.
Full-body coverage for added protection.
Functional pockets for tools and accessories.
Suitable for construction, industrial, and outdoor work.
Available sizes: S – M – L – XL – XXL.

products.name: High Visibility Waterproof Jacket
products.description: Designed for demanding outdoor work environments, our jacket delivers reliable protection, visibility, and comfort in all weather conditions. It is made from water-resistant and insulated fabric. It features a warm polar fleece lining, offering thermal insulation and comfort in cold and windy conditions.
features: Meets ANSI/ISEA 107 - 20 Class 1.
Waterproof and insulated.
Polar fleece lining for thermal comfort.
2-inch reflective tape for enhanced visibility.
Functional 3 front zipper pockets.
Removable hood for added versatility.
Available sizes: S – M – L – XL – XXL.
